ConnectionStrings._note: Provide DefaultConnection via user secrets in development (dotnet user-secrets), or environment/Key Vault in production. Never commit the real connection string.

Loremaster._aiModelNote: AiModel is the Azure OpenAI deployment name, not the model name. Deployment 'nornis-ask' -> model gpt-5.4-mini (snapshot 2026-03-17). The ModelPricing key MUST match AiModel or cost tracking silently records $0. Rates per 1M tokens (verify against your resource's pricing blade): input $0.75 / output $4.50.
